name_cn:
Woc Wealth Bag (Magnetic Closure)
Big Ball ~ Calfskin 🐂
Classic quilted design with leather-wrapped metal chain
Appearance is the same as the classic Woc
The snap button has been upgraded to a more convenient magnetic clasp
Super great upgrade design~💕
Size: 19cm
Model: 0250woc
